description: Search for tweets on Twitter/X using a text query. Extracts matching tweets with author, text, engagement counts, and timestamps. Supports sorting by relevance or latest. Navigates to x.com/search with the encoded query.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Twitter/X search is accessible at x.com/search?q={query}&src=typed_query. The 'Top' tab shows relevance-ranked results; the 'Latest' tab shows chronological results. Results render as article[data-testid='tweet'] elements — same structure as the timeline. Search bar is input[data-testid='SearchBox_Search_Input']. Results tab switching: 'a[href*="f=live"]' for Latest, default tab for Top.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Encode query in URL for navigation — avoids typing into search bar for reliability. Switch tabs via href patterns. Tweet extraction identical to timeline recipe using article[data-testid='tweet'] containers.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Read-only search — minimal bot detection risk. URL-based navigation is preferred over typing in search box. Add 1s wait after navigation to allow search results to hydrate fully.
reasoning.performance: Expected run time: 10-15 seconds (navigation 3s + results load 3s + extraction 3-8s). No typing needed.

query.description: Search query. Supports Twitter search operators (from:, #hashtag, -word, etc.)

count.description: Maximum number of tweets to return. Default 20.

steps.description: Navigate to search results with encoded query (Top/Relevance tab)
Verify authenticated — if redirected to login flow, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Navigate to Latest tab if sort is 'latest'
Wait for tweet results or empty state to render
Extract search result tweets with engagement data
Return extracted search result tweets as structured data

tweet_text.example: Agent delegation is the new paradigm...

error_handling.session_expired: Detect x.com/i/flow/login redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED, re-run session login recipe first
error_handling.no_results: Return empty tweets array with total_extracted: 0 — not an error; query may just have no matches
error_handling.element_not_found: Log selector tried, capture screenshot, try fallback_selector if defined
error_handling.rate_limited: If search rate limit detected, wait 60s then retry once
error_handling.latest_tab_not_found: Fall back to Top results if Latest tab href selector not found
